scripts.db:init: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {Pool}=require('pg'); const fs=require('fs'); const p=new Pool({host:process.env.DB_HOST,port:process.env.DB_PORT,database:process.env.DB_NAME,user:process.env.DB_USER,password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD}); p.query(fs.readFileSync('./schema.sql','utf8')).then(()=>{console.log('Schema applied');process.exit(0)}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);process.exit(1)})"
scripts.db:migrate: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {Pool}=require('pg'); const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const p=new Pool({host:process.env.DB_HOST,port:process.env.DB_PORT,database:process.env.DB_NAME,user:process.env.DB_USER,password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD}); const dir='./migrations'; const files=fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.sql')).sort(); Promise.all(files.map(f=>p.query(fs.readFileSync(path.join(dir,f),'utf8')).then(()=>console.log('Applied:',f)).catch(e=>console.error('Failed:',f,e.message)))).then(()=>process.exit(0))"
